title: French Lentil Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with red lentils, tender beef, and a variety of aromatics.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, cook the bacon over medium heat until browned. Remove the bacon with a slotted spoon.
Add the garlic, onion, carrot, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the lentils, diced bacon, and enough broth to cover the ingredients. Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
